Package io.github.elevateddev.lattice.graph

Class GraphCompilationReport.Edge

java.lang.Object
io.github.elevateddev.lattice.graph.GraphCompilationReport.Edge
Enclosing class:
GraphCompilationReport
public static final class GraphCompilationReport.Edge extends Object
Decision row for one logical edge.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Edge(String from, String to, EdgeSpec.EdgeKind declaredKind, EdgeSpec.EdgeKind effectiveKind, GraphCompilationReport.EdgeUseKind use, String allocationOwner, boolean sourceIngressCloseGuard, boolean redirectOnly, GraphCompilationReport.Reason reason, String explanation)
    Creates an edge decision row.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    allocationOwner()
    Returns the worker or subsystem that owns allocation for this edge.
    EdgeSpec.EdgeKind
    declaredKind()
    Returns the declared edge kind before compiler specialization.
    EdgeSpec.EdgeKind
    effectiveKind()
    Returns the effective runtime edge kind.
    String
    explanation()
    Returns a human-readable explanation, or an empty string.
    String
    from()
    Returns the source node name.
    String
    key()
    Returns the edge key in from->to form.
    Optional<GraphCompilationReport.Reason>
    reason()
    Returns the fallback or specialization reason, when present.
    boolean
    redirectOnly()
    Returns whether this edge exists only as a redirect target.
    boolean
    sourceIngressCloseGuard()
    Returns whether this source ingress uses the SPSC close guard.
    String
    to()
    Returns the target node name.
    GraphCompilationReport.EdgeUseKind
    use()
    Returns how the runtime uses this edge.

      Creates an edge decision row.

  • Method Details

    • key

      public String key()
      Returns the edge key in from->to form.

    • from

      public String from()
      Returns the source node name.

    • to

      public String to()
      Returns the target node name.

    • declaredKind

      public EdgeSpec.EdgeKind declaredKind()
      Returns the declared edge kind before compiler specialization.

    • effectiveKind

      public EdgeSpec.EdgeKind effectiveKind()
      Returns the effective runtime edge kind.

    • use

      public GraphCompilationReport.EdgeUseKind use()
      Returns how the runtime uses this edge.

    • allocationOwner

      public String allocationOwner()
      Returns the worker or subsystem that owns allocation for this edge.

    • sourceIngressCloseGuard

      public boolean sourceIngressCloseGuard()
      Returns whether this source ingress uses the SPSC close guard.

    • redirectOnly

      public boolean redirectOnly()
      Returns whether this edge exists only as a redirect target.

    • reason

      public Optional<GraphCompilationReport.Reason> reason()
      Returns the fallback or specialization reason, when present.

    • explanation

      public String explanation()
      Returns a human-readable explanation, or an empty string.
